name: pandasv2
summary: pandasv2: pandas drop-in replacement with memory optimization, nested JSON handling, parallel groupby, chunked processing, fast apply, unified apply/map API, safe merge validation, dtype optimization, DataFrame profiling, append compatibility for pandas 3.0, JSON serialization, diff tracking, column validation, streaming export, and seamless FastAPI/Flask/Django integration. Import as pandasv2
author: Mahesh Makvana
